title: The Key.
content:
Wouldst thou know thyself, observe the actions of others.
    Wouldst thou other men know, look thou within thine own heart.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Friedrich Schiller, titled "The Key.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
